query: I'd like to produce a technical research report comparing REST and gRPC for our internal microservice mesh.
Can you do technical research on whether to use a managed vector database, a self-hosted one, or pgvector for our RAG feature?
Research the trade-offs between Kafka and RabbitMQ for our event-driven architecture and recommend one.
I need domain research on how the indoor-agriculture industry is structured.
Do market research on the customers and competitors for our reusable-cup product.
Just implement the gRPC service for the orders module following our existing patterns.
